title: Endangered Species
questions: Do you worry about the world's endangered species?
Which animals, fish and plants do you think are most endangered?
What do you think the growing list of endangered species says about humankind?
Which endangered species would you least like to see disappear?
Are there endangered species in your country?
Do you do anything to protect endangered species?
Forty percent of all organisms are endangered. What do you think about this?
Why are so many species becoming endangered?
Do you think the list of endangered species can ever get shorter?
Do you think humans will ever be an endangered species?
What should governments do to protect endangered species?
What do you think of the sale of products made from endangered species and how can we stop it?
Do you think endangered species can be bred in zoos or captive breeding programmes and then released into the wild?
Would you like to work for an agency that protects endangered species?
Do you know of any endangered species success stories?
How important is it to teach children about endangered species?
Which countries do you think are most guilty for endangering life?
Do you think honest politicians are an endangered species?
What question would you like to ask an endangered species?
